productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men Printed White T-shirt
description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of blended cotton fabric, has short sleeves and print on the chest Fit Slim Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; Do not iron directly on print/embroidery This T-shirt from classic polo is perfect for the individual alpha male who's fixated on the minimal mood of the moment. This tee is an off-duty essential in every cosmopolitan man's wardrobe which can be worn with denims and a jacket for a weekend in the great outdoors. Wear with casual shoes and understated belts. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
